headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on EPAM Systems, Lowers Price Target to $167
summary: Susquehanna  analyst James Friedman   maintains EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) with a Positive and lowers the price target from $199 to $167.

headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on EPAM Systems, Lowers Price Target to $200
summary: Guggenheim  analyst Jonathan Lee   maintains EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $225 to $200.
